title: The Adventures of Frank Merriwell
writer: Burt L. Standish, George H. Plympton, Ella O'Neill
actors: Donald Briggs, Jean Rogers, John 'Dusty' King
plot: A 12-episode serial in which scholastic sports star Frank Merriwell leaves school to search for his missing father. His adventures involve a mysterious inscription on a ring, buried treasure, kidnaping and Indian raids. He saves h...
